summary: Homepage navigation testing to verify access to product pages and resources via top navigation and platform layer section links

content.objective: Verify that clicking the PRODUCTS navigation menu item successfully navigates to the Agentic SOC Platform page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the PRODUCTS button in the top navigation menu
validations: The page navigates to the Agentic SOC Platform page
The page heading displays ANOMALI AGENTIC SOC PLATFORM

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Learn More button in the LAYER 1 section successfully navigates to the Unified Security Data Lake page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Navigate back using the browser back button
Click the Learn More button in the LAYER 1: UNIFIED SECURITY DATA LAKE section
validations: The page navigates to the Unified Security Data Lake page
The page heading displays ANOMALI UNIFIED SECURITY DATA LAKE
